infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: LifeLink needs microphone access to record your voice description of the emergency.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: LifeLink needs camera access to capture scene photos for AI triage.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: LifeLink needs your location to send emergency responders to your exact position.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: LifeLink uses location to dispatch responders even when the app is in the background.

plugins.cameraPermission: LifeLink needs camera access to capture scene photos for AI triage.

plugins.microphonePermission: LifeLink needs microphone access to record your voice description.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: LifeLink needs location to dispatch responders to you.
